center.name: 烏魯班巴山谷
center.summary: 烏魯班巴山谷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括White-eared puffbird、Kalinowski's chat-tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: boliviana is found in north-central Peru's San Martín and Huánuco departments and then from the Urubamba Valley in southern Cuzco south on the eastern Andean slope into the western part of central Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In this region, it favors the dry forests and scrub found in parts of the Valleys of Mantaro, Apurimac and Urubamba at altitudes between 1000 and 2200 m
